{{infobox football tournament season
|title           = Copa do Brasil
|year            = 1992
|other_titles    = Copa do Brasil 1992
|image           =
|image_size       = 250px
|caption         = 
|country         = Brazil
|dates           = July 7 - December 13
|num_teams       = 32
|winners       = [[Sport Club Internacional|Internacional (RS)]]
|second       = [[Fluminense Football Club|Fluminense (RJ)]]
|matches         = 62
|goals           = 165
|scoring_leader = [[Gérson da Silva]] (9)
|award          = 
|prev_season      = [[1991 Copa do Brasil|1991]]
|next_season      = [[1993 Copa do Brasil|1993]]
}}

The '''Copa do Brasil 1992''' was the 4th staging of the [[Copa do Brasil]].

The competition started on July 7, 1992, and concluded on December 13, 1992, with the second leg of the final, held at the [[Estádio Beira-Rio]] in [[Porto Alegre]], in which [[Sport Club Internacional|Internacional]] lifted the trophy for the first time with a 1–0 victory over [[Fluminense Football Club|Fluminense]].

Gérson, of [[Sport Club Internacional|Internacional]], with 9 goals, was the competition's topscorer.

==Format==
The competition was disputed by 32 clubs in a [[Single-elimination tournament|knock-out]] format where all rounds were played in two legs and the [[away goals rule]] was used.

==Competition stages==
{{32TeamBracket

| RD1-team01=[[Campinense Clube|Campinense (PB)]]
| RD1-score01=1 0
| RD1-team02='''[[Esporte Clube Bahia|Bahia (BA)]]'''
| RD1-score02=1 0

| RD1-team03=[[Operário Futebol Clube (MS)|Operário (MS)]]
| RD1-score03=1 0
| RD1-team04='''[[Clube Atlético Paranaense|Atlético (PR)]]'''
| RD1-score04=3 3

| RD1-team05=[[Sampaio Corrêa Futebol Clube|Sampaio Corrêa (MA)]]
| RD1-score05=0 0
| RD1-team06='''[[Sociedade Esportiva Palmeiras|Palmeiras (SP)]]'''
| RD1-score06=1 4

| RD1-team07=[[Goiás Esporte Clube|Goiás (GO)]]
| RD1-score07=0 0
| RD1-team08='''[[Clube do Remo|Remo (PA)]]'''
| RD1-score08=0 1

| RD1-team09='''[[Sport Club Corinthians Paulista|Corinthians (SP)]]'''
| RD1-score09=3 3
| RD1-team10=[[América Futebol Clube (RN)|América (RN)]]
| RD1-score10=0 0

| RD1-team11=[[Muniz Freire Futebol Clube|Muniz Freire (ES)]]
| RD1-score11=1 0
| RD1-team12='''[[Sport Club Internacional|Internacional (RS)]]'''
| RD1-score12=3 5

| RD1-team13=[[Ji-Paraná Futebol Clube|Ji-Paraná (RO)]]
| RD1-score13=0 1
| RD1-team14='''[[Grêmio Foot-Ball Porto Alegrense|Grêmio (RS)]]'''
| RD1-score14=4 4

| RD1-team15=[[Esporte Clube Democrata|Democrata/GV (MG)]]
| RD1-score15=1 1
| RD1-team16='''[[Paraná Clube|Paraná (PR)]]'''
| RD1-score16=1 2

| RD1-team17=[[Atlético Acreano|Atlético (AC)]]
| RD1-score17=0 0
| RD1-team18='''[[Clube Atlético Mineiro|Atlético (MG)]]'''
| RD1-score18=1 2

| RD1-team19=[[Sociedade Esportiva e Recreativa Juventude|Juventude (MT)]]
| RD1-score19=0 1
| RD1-team20='''[[Criciúma Esporte Clube|Criciúma (SC)]]'''
| RD1-score20=5 3

| RD1-team21=[[Sociedade Esportiva Picos|Picos (PI)]]
| RD1-score21=2 1
| RD1-team22='''[[Fluminense Football Club|Fluminense (RJ)]]'''
| RD1-score22=4 2

| RD1-team23='''[[Club Sportivo Sergipe|Sergipe (SE)]]'''
| RD1-score23=1 2
| RD1-team24=[[Clube Náutico Capibaribe|Náutico (PE)]]
| RD1-score24=2 0

| RD1-team25='''[[Fortaleza Esporte Clube|Fortaleza (CE)]]'''
| RD1-score25=1 0 (pen: 5)
| RD1-team26=[[Taguatinga Esporte Clube|Taguatinga (DF)]]
| RD1-score26=0 1 (pen: 3)

| RD1-team27=[[Amapá Clube|Amapá (AP)]]
| RD1-score27=0 0
| RD1-team28='''[[Sport Club do Recife|Sport (PE)]]'''
| RD1-score28=0 3

| RD1-team29=[[Tuna Luso Brasileira|Tuna Luso (PA)]]
| RD1-score29=2 0
| RD1-team30='''[[Centro Sportivo Alagoano|CSA (AL)]]'''
| RD1-score30=1 4

| RD1-team31=[[Nacional Futebol Clube|Nacional (AM)]]
| RD1-score31=1 0
| RD1-team32='''[[Club de Regatas Vasco da Gama|Vasco (RJ)]]'''
| RD1-score32=1 5

| RD2-team01=Bahia (BA)
| RD2-score01=0 1
| RD2-team02='''Atlético (PR)'''
| RD2-score02=0 2

| RD2-team03='''Palmeiras (SP)'''
| RD2-score03=0 5
| RD2-team04=Remo (PA)
| RD2-score04=0 1

| RD2-team05=Corinthians (SP)
| RD2-score05=0 0
| RD2-team06='''Internacional (RS)'''
| RD2-score06=4 0

| RD2-team07='''Grêmio (RS)'''
| RD2-score07=0 2
| RD2-team08=Paraná (PR)
| RD2-score08=1 1

| RD2-team09=Atlético (MG)
| RD2-score09=3 0
| RD2-team10='''Criciúma (SC)'''
| RD2-score10=2 1

| RD2-team11='''Fluminense (RJ)'''
| RD2-score11=1 2
| RD2-team12=Sergipe (SE)
| RD2-score12=0 2

| RD2-team13=Fortaleza (CE)
| RD2-score13=0 0
| RD2-team14='''Sport (PE)'''
| RD2-score14=0 4

| RD2-team15='''CSA (AL)'''
| RD2-score15=3 1
| RD2-team16=Vasco (RJ)
| RD2-score16=3 0

| RD3-team01=Atlético (PR)
| RD3-score01=0 1
| RD3-team02='''Palmeiras (SP)'''
| RD3-score02=1 3

| RD3-team03='''Internacional (RS)'''
| RD3-score03=1 1 (pen: 3)
| RD3-team04=Grêmio (RS)
| RD3-score04=1 1 (pen: 0)

| RD3-team05=Criciúma (SC)
| RD3-score05=1 0
| RD3-team06='''Fluminense (RJ)'''
| RD3-score06=2 3

| RD3-team07='''Sport (PE)'''
| RD3-score07=3 4
| RD3-team08=CSA (AL)
| RD3-score08=1 0

| RD4-team01=Palmeiras (SP)
| RD4-score01=0 1
| RD4-team02='''Internacional (RS)'''
| RD4-score02=2 2

| RD4-team03='''Fluminense (RJ)'''
| RD4-score03=2 1
| RD4-team04=Sport (PE)
| RD4-score04=1 1

| RD5-team01='''Internacional (RS)'''
| RD5-score01=1 1
| RD5-team02=Fluminense (RJ)
| RD5-score02=2 0
}}

{| class="wikitable" style="text-align: center; margin: 0 auto;"
|-
!Copa do Brasil<br />1992 Winners
|-
|[[Image:Bandeira do Rio Grande do Sul.svg|100px|Rio Grande do Sul]]<br>'''[[Sport Club Internacional|Internacional]]'''<br/>'''First Title'''
|}

==References==
* [https://web.archive.org/web/20070826231704/http://paginas.terra.com.br/esporte/rsssfbrasil/tables/cbr1992.htm Copa do Brasil 1992 at RSSSF]

{{Copa do Brasil Seasons}}

{{DEFAULTSORT:Copa Do Brasil 1992}}
[[Category:Copa do Brasil seasons|1992]]
[[Category:1992 in Brazilian football]]
[[Category:1992 in domestic association football cups]]
